title: Reset Device - Restore Defaults - Restore - Yes
scenario: Factory reset via Poly Studio Mobile app restores all device settings to default values
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on your mobile device.
2. From the Home screen, tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
3. Change one or more settings away from their default values (e.g., adjust EQ, toggle ANC/Transparency Mode, change notification settings).
4. Navigate to Device Settings → Reset Device.
5. Under the "Restore Defaults" section, tap the "Restore" button.
6. When the confirmation pop-up appears, tap "Yes" to confirm.
7. Observe the confirmation message "Settings Restored!" displayed on the screen.
8. Tap "OK" to dismiss the confirmation message.
9. Navigate back through the settings (e.g., Audio Settings, ANC, Equalizer, Notifications) and verify that all settings have been restored to their factory default values as per UI specifications.
expected: All device settings (EQ, ANC, Transparency Mode, Notifications, etc.) are restored to their factory default values. The "Settings Restored!" confirmation message is displayed, and after tapping "OK", the UI reflects the default settings.
